Since pos4 green ensures at least one t at pos4, pos3 yellow indicates there's another t elsewhere not at pos3, but could be same t counted twice? Since pos4 matches exactly, that consumes the t. pos3 yellow would then be red because no additional t. But it's yellow, meaning the target has at least two t's.
